title: The Dry Bulker Shipbreaking Market A Bleak Year
section_path: The Dry Bulker Shipbreaking Market A Bleak Year
section_path_text: The Dry Bulker Shipbreaking Market A Bleak Year
summary:
Main
The dry bulker shipbreaking market was nothing short of bleak last year as a total of 65 bulk carriers were scrapped, amounting to 3.3 million Dwt. Accordingly, last year's saw 4 Capesizes, 17 Panamaxes, 16 Handymaxes, 12 Handysizes, and 16 Minibulkers scrapped. All told, this was significantly below the past 10-year average of 151 vessels and the lowest since 1990.
